title: AA Magnetic L Plate, White, Pack of 2
description: From the manufacturer AA Magnetic L Plates AA5060 Magentic L Plates Fully Magnetic Pack of 2 AA fully magnetic L Plates come as a pack of 2 and have a backing that is entirely magnetic - not magnetic strips. High Quality AA magnetic L Plates are reusable, made of high quality PVC, lightweight, waterproof, flexible and durable. Designed to be easily removed when not required but wind resistant. Non scratch. Fitting Instructions Please follow the above advice.
